feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.name: Sorcerer's Spellcasting
feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.description: Innate magic infuses you. You use Spell Points instead of slots to fuel your magic. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

feat_sorcerous_origin.name: Sorcerous Origin
feat_sorcerous_origin.description: Choose a sorcerous origin that describes the source of your innate power.

feat_font_of_magic.name: Font of Magic
feat_font_of_magic.description: Tap into a wellspring of magic (Sorcery Points) to create spell slots or fuel features. Podes usar uma Bonus Action para converter pontos.

feat_metamagic.name: Metamagic
feat_metamagic.description: Twist your spells to suit your needs. Escolhe duas opções de Metamagic.

meta_quickened.name: Quickened Spell
meta_quickened.description: Ao conjurares uma magia que tem casting time de 1 Action, podes gastar 2 sorcery points para mudar o casting time para 1 Bonus Action.

meta_twinned.name: Twinned Spell
meta_twinned.description: Ao conjurares uma magia de target único, podes gastar sorcery points para atingir um segundo alvo.

meta_subtle.name: Subtle Spell
meta_subtle.description: Podes gastar 1 sorcery point para conjurar uma magia sem qualquer componente verbal ou somático.

meta_empowered.name: Empowered Spell
meta_empowered.description: Quando rolas dano, podes gastar 1 sorcery point para rolar novamente um número de dados igual ao teu modificador de Carisma.

feat_sorcerous_versatility.name: Sorcerous Versatility
feat_sorcerous_versatility.description: Whenever you gain an ASI, you can replace one Metamagic option.

feat_sorcerer_asi_4.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_magical_guidance.name: Magical Guidance
feat_magical_guidance.description: Spend 1 sorcery point as a Reaction to reroll a failed ability check.

feat_sorcerer_asi_8.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_sorcerer_asi_12.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_sorcerer_asi_16.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_sorcerer_asi_19.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_sorcerous_restoration.name: Sorcerous Restoration
feat_sorcerous_restoration.description: Regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.

feat_draconic_ancestor.name: Dragon Ancestor
feat_draconic_ancestor.description: Choose a dragon ancestor. Gain Primordial language and double PB on Charisma checks with dragons.

ancestor_red.name: Red Dragon (Fire)
ancestor_red.description: O teu ancestral era um Dragão Vermelho. Ficas ligado ao elemento de Fogo.

ancestor_blue.name: Blue Dragon (Lightning)
ancestor_blue.description: O teu ancestral era um Dragão Azul. Ficas ligado ao elemento de Lightning.

ancestor_green.name: Green Dragon (Poison)
ancestor_green.description: O teu ancestral era um Dragão Verde. Ficas ligado ao elemento de Veneno.

ancestor_white.name: White Dragon (Cold)
ancestor_white.description: O teu ancestral era um Dragão Branco. Ficas ligado ao elemento de Frio.

ancestor_black.name: Black Dragon (Acid)
ancestor_black.description: O teu ancestral era um Dragão Negro. Ficas ligado ao elemento de Ácido.

feat_draconic_resilience.name: Draconic Resilience
feat_draconic_resilience.description: HP increases by 1 per level. While unarmored, AC = 13 + Dex modifier.

feat_elemental_affinity.name: Elemental Affinity
feat_elemental_affinity.description: Add Charisma modifier to damage of your ancestor's element.

feat_dragon_wings.name: Dragon Wings
feat_dragon_wings.description: Sprout wings as a Bonus Action, gaining flying speed equal to current speed.

feat_draconic_presence.name: Draconic Presence
feat_draconic_presence.description: As an Action, spend 5 points to exude an aura of awe or fear for 1 minute.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.

subclasses.name: Draconic Bloodline
subclasses.description: Your innate magic comes from draconic blood mingled with your ancestry.
